players.name: Cal Raleigh
players.summary: Grand slam highlights Mariners' 5-2 win over Rangers. Bryan Woo dominated on the mound.

players.name: Luis Arraez
players.summary: 2-for-4 (2 singles) but Giants were shut out 3-0. Making contact but no run support.

players.name: Bo Bichette
players.summary: 1-for-4 in NYM game; no runs or RBI.

players.name: Francisco Lindor
players.summary: Solo home run and R in 2-for-4 performance. Trending better after slow start — .310 avg in last 7 games. Hamate recovery progressing well.

players.name: Pete Crow-Armstrong
players.summary: 1-for-3 with a run scored in CHC win. Steady contributor.

players.name: Jackson Merrill
players.summary: 0-for-3 at the plate but made a highlight-reel HR-robbing catch in the outfield.

players.name: Teoscar Hernández
players.summary: Day off vs Rockies. Ryan Ward made his MLB debut in Teoscar's place. Dodgers lost 9-6 to COL with Roki Sasaki starting.

players.name: Giancarlo Stanton
players.summary: Scheduled rest day; Ben Rice started at DH. Regular maintenance day off for NYY.

players.name: Devin Williams
players.summary: Clean inning (1.0 IP, 0 ER, 1K) in hold situation. No save opportunity. Has 1 SV, 0 W on the season.

players.name: Zack Wheeler
players.summary: Continues recovery from venous thoracic outlet syndrome. Target return: April 24-26 home series vs Atlanta. Has not pitched this season (0.0 IP).

players.name: Cole Ragans
players.summary: Rough outing: 4.1 IP, 7 ER, 8 BB — serious control issues. Season ERA now 14.00. IP/G = 3.0 means season RSAR = 0 (below 3.5 IP/G minimum).

players.name: Chase Burns
players.summary: Off day; last pitched Thursday April 16. On normal rotation schedule.

players.name: Nathan Eovaldi
players.summary: Pitched April 18 (day before report date); off April 19.

players.name: Emmet Sheehan
players.summary: Started April 18 vs Rockies, took the loss 4-3. Off April 19.

players.name: Reid Detmers
players.summary: Quality start: 6.0 IP, 2 ER, 6K despite the loss. ERA improved from 5.14 to 4.50. Solid performance.

injuries.name: Zack Wheeler
injuries.note: Venous thoracic outlet syndrome; placed on IL April 8; return target April 24-26 home series vs Atlanta Braves. 0.0 IP this season.

injuries.name: Francisco Lindor
injuries.note: Hamate bone surgery February 2026; playing through recovery; power limited early (.132 AVG, 0 HR in first 38 AB) but trending better (.310 last 7G, HR today).
